summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly a mixed PR inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined item-by-item; closed refs are not planned for closure; non-security open PRs are kept for normal maintainer/review handling.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive primary candidate is out of ProjectClownfish mutation scope and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Already closed and not security-sensitive in the provided item matrix; no mutation is appropriate.
Open non-security PR with a focused implementation should remain in the maintainer review flow.
Focused non-security feature/observability PR is not a duplicate within this inventory shard.
This touches loopback bearer-token scope and must be quarantined to central security handling.
The PR changes authorization behavior around browser proxy invocation and belongs in central security handling, not backlog cleanup.
SecretRef/Vault credential handling and dependency graph changes are security-sensitive and out of ProjectClownfish mutation scope.
Focused non-security contributor PR should remain open for maintainer review; closure and merge are not allowed by this plan job.
Open focused session-state PR has unresolved proof requirements, so keep it in review rather than closing or merging.
Open non-security availability PR needs proof/maintainer review and is independent in this inventory shard.
